title: 四模型名词-属性桥接因果搜索

per_case.sentence: An apple is a kind of fruit.
The apple belongs to the fruit family.
The apple is red and sweet.
The apple is about the size of a fist.
The banana is yellow, and the apple sits on the plate.
A banana is a kind of fruit.
People often eat a banana as a snack.
The banana is yellow and soft.
The apple is red, while the banana is on the plate.

core_answer: 名词与属性之间的连接并不只是结构重叠，其中一小组跨名词知识和属性绑定共享的神经元，在部分模型里已经开始表现出可压缩的桥接因果作用。
